stats.fact: Lovable pricing starts at $25/month for 100 credits (Pro) up to $2,250/month for 10,000 credits at the top tier
Lovable free plan gives only 5 daily credits capped at 30/month — enough to experiment but not to ship a real product
Lovable hit a $6.6 billion valuation in under a year, reflecting massive adoption of AI-powered app building
Annual billing saves 2 months of cost (equivalent to ~17% discount) compared to monthly billing
University students and teachers get 50% off all Lovable rates; nonprofits receive 20% off
Unused credits roll over: monthly plan credits roll over for 1 month; annual plan credits roll over for the rest of the year
